calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith.

Petitioner Wood Robbins, LLP's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. Respondent Rosendo Lopez acknowledges that he filed his request to vacate the award outside the mandatory and jurisdictional 100-day deadline of CCP 1288. The court cannot provide Mr. Lopez relief per CCP 473. The court lacks authority to vacate the award and must confirm it. (Abers v. Rohrs (2013) 217 Cal.App.4th 1199, 1211-1212.)

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Dawn D. Johnson of Wood Robbins, LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-247-7900 appearing
forthe Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
No other appearances on the matter.


RULNG - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Wood Robbins, LLP's petition for order confirming arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment
sgned in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torrano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
